# Daniel Cruz Rodrigues — Senior Data Engineer Portfolio

> Senior Data Engineer with 4+ years building large-scale data pipelines on
> Databricks, Apache Spark, and AWS. Six AWS certifications. Databricks certified.
> Open to international remote opportunities in data engineering and cloud-native roles.

## About
- Full name: Daniel Cruz Rodrigues
- Role: Senior Data Engineer
- Employer: NTT DATA — Banco Itaú project (current, Mar 2025–present)
- Location: Fortaleza, Brazil (UTC-3) — open to remote or relocation
- Contact: danielcruz.alu.lmb@gmail.com
- Portfolio: https://danielportfolio.eddesucesso.tech/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/danielcruzbianalytics/
- GitHub: https://github.com/EddesucessoCloud
- Blog: https://danielcruzrodrigues.hashnode.dev

## Career Summary
Daniel Cruz Rodrigues is a Senior Data Engineer specialising in the Databricks ecosystem
and AWS cloud infrastructure. He designs and operates production Data Lake platforms using
the medallion architecture (bronze/silver/gold) on Delta Lake, processing over 20 million
records per day with ACID guarantees. His work at NTT DATA (Banco Itaú) delivered a 25%
reduction in AWS infrastructure costs and approximately 30% improvement in pipeline query
latency through Spark optimisation. He also built anomaly detection models that reduced
Mean Time to Detect (MTTD) production incidents by approximately 50%.

## Key Achievements
- Apache Spark pipelines processing 20M+ records/day on Databricks + Delta Lake
- Reduced pipeline MTTD by ~50% via Datadog/Prometheus/Grafana observability stack
- Delivered ~30% query latency improvement through Spark partitioning and caching
- Cut AWS infrastructure costs by 25% via Spot Instances, EMR right-sizing, and FinOps review
- Architected serverless portfolio (Cloud Resume Challenge) on AWS with Terraform IaC and GitHub Actions CI/CD

## Experience
- Senior Data Engineer — NTT DATA · Banco Itaú (Mar 2025–present)
- Data Engineer — NTT DATA · Banco Itaú (May 2024–Mar 2025)
- Data Engineer — PowerOfData (Jun 2023–May 2024)
- Junior Data Engineer — PowerOfData (Jun 2022–May 2023)

## Core Skills
Databricks, Delta Lake, Apache Spark, PySpark, AWS EMR, AWS Glue, AWS Step Functions,
AWS Lambda, S3, DynamoDB, Athena, Terraform, Apache Airflow, MLlib, Scikit-learn,
TensorFlow, Datadog, Prometheus, Grafana, CloudWatch, Docker, GitHub Actions, Python,
Advanced SQL, Scala
